name: Bulgogi
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beef sirloin and light soy sauce in a bowl until well coated.
2. Add water, minced scallion, garlic, dark soy sauce, sesame oil, black bean paste, Shaoxing wine, sugar, cayenne pepper, ginger, and 1/4 teaspoon of salt to the bowl. Mix everything together until well combined.
3. Place the marinade in a shallow dish and cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight for best results.
4. Preheat your grill or broiler to medium-high heat.
5. Remove the beef from the marinade, allowing excess to drip off, then place it on the preheated grill or under the broiler to cook until browned and slightly charred on each side, about 3-4 minutes per side.
6. Transfer the cooked beef to a serving platter and sprinkle toasted sesame seeds over the top.
7. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the sugar and cayenne pepper, stirring until fragrant. Remove from heat and set aside.
8. Serve the bulgogi hot with the sauce on the side for drizzling.
